caption: Figure 8.1: a) P6238 CUSSONS free and forced vortex apparatus, b) push-in orifices, c) free vortex measuring caliper, d) force vortex measuring probes
description: A composite image showing the experimental setup for vortex studies. Part (a) shows the main cylindrical vessel with inlet and outlet pipes. Part (b) shows three different sized orifices (8mm, 16mm, 24mm). Part (c) shows a measuring caliper for free vortices, and part (d) shows a set of probes for measuring forced vortices.
